description: Create a four-file Talon Voice configuration in C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\Talon\user\criminal_records\ that provides voice-driven form navigation, a named-field vocabulary, and Python-backed data formatters. The configuration must include 'form_nav.talon' implementing commands for navigation and form control (next/previous field, named field navigation, clear, submit, cancel, copy, and paste); 'form_fields.talon-list' defining a 'user.form_field_name' list with mappings for case number, first name, last name, date of birth, offense type, arresting officer, badge number, incident date, location, and status; 'formatters.py' using the Talon Module and @mod.action_class to define formatting functions for case numbers, badge numbers, and dates; and 'data_entry.talon' which calls the Python formatters and implements a case status vocabulary (open, closed, pending, warrant issued, dismissed) with a command to enter the status.
